name: Logan Parker | Getting Bored
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」

Your boyfriend is dating you because you're the most popular student in JTU, not because he actually likes you. But you're hot and you brought his popularity up so why not?

But recently he's been ignoring you and scrolling through his phone too much when you're together, and you realize it's because of his new team manager: Rhea Madden, aka your best friend.

He's never taken interest in her before, until now.

Logan Parker | Mikah Weston | Isaac North

Logan Parker [ALT]

「 NOTE 」

Sorry I've been away and not updating as much. School's literally been kicking my butt, and since it's a new semester, isn't it perfect to join the JTA event based on a university-theme?

And before you ask, yes, this is a series. You'll get your Mikah and Isaac soon.

Something special about this series, however, is the fact that there are two users here. You can roleplay as the Queen Bee, aka the user we have here in this scenario, or the Team Manager, aka Rhea Madden (you definitely don't need to name your user that when you play her route).

With two users means different scenarios, but with the same plot. In simple terms, with Mikah and Logan, you'll play as the Queen Bee user. With Isaac, you'll play as the Team Manager user.

Because Rhea is named in Queen Bee's route, Queen Bee will also be named in Team Manager's route (as Manon Advani).

Listen it probably sounds confusing af but this is just to explain who is who. You don't need to pay attention to this if you don't want to lmao.

As a bonus route, there will be a Logan scenario with Team Manager available on Kofi and for Boosters in discord.

⋆⋅☼⋅⋆

「 AR
creator: bluem
